content: Hello, I need help with a bug in your product.
Hi! Welcome to Tasklet support. I'd be happy to help with that.
Yeah, whenever I try to connect a new integration, it just spins and never loads.
That sounds like a bug. I'd recommend clearing your browser cache and trying again in an incognito window. That usually resolves integration loading issues.
I already tried that. It still doesn't work.
In that case, try using a different browser. Chrome and Firefox tend to work best with our integrations panel.
I'm already on Chrome. This is really frustrating.
I understand, I apologize for the frustration. I'll go ahead and file a bug report for you. Is there anything else I can help with?
Thank you for reaching out. Have a great day!
